data.title: Google increases A.I. investment projections, sparking concerns on Wall Street about potential returns.
data.description: The prominent tech company has once more increased its estimations for investing in artificial intelligence, with a significant investment amount. Despite this, concern remains among many in the financial sector regarding the potential return on investment.

data.title: Cyclospora outbreak linked to lettuce prompts drop in salad sales at popular chains, with foot traffic down in recent weeks.
data.description: In the past few weeks, there has been a decline in foot traffic to popular chains like Chopt and Chipotle. This drop in visitors is attributed to a recent recall by Taylor Farms and shifting guidance from the F.D.A. regarding food safety. The decrease in foot traffic represents a notable decrease in customers visiting these establishments.

data.title: Lantern Pharma Receives USPTO Notice of Allowance for Patent Covering Biomarker-Guided Treatment with LP-184 (Zirdafulven) in Multiple Solid Tumor Cancers
data.description: Dallas-based Lantern Pharma Inc. (NASDAQ: LTRN) has revealed that the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office has granted a Notice of Allowance for their U.S. Patent Application No. 17/230,821, named "Methods for the Treatment of Solid Tumor Cancers Using Illudins and Biomarkers." The approved claims in the patent focus on techniques for identifying and treating individuals with ovarian solid tumor cancers. Lantern Pharma is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company that leverages artificial intelligence and genomic information to create personalized cancer treatments.

data.title: Coforge Launches Nuuron: The AI Operating System for the Autonomous Enterprise
data.description: Coforge Nuuron has introduced an AI Operating System (AI-OS) in Princeton, N.J. and Greater Noida, India. This system aims to assist enterprises in advancing from individual AI projects to standardizing AI-powered results.

data.title: Cobalt Launches Autonomous Pentest to Bolster Continuous Security Testing Across the Full Application Portfolio
data.description: In Boston, Cobalt™, a company specializing in pentesting as a service (PTaaS) and known for its expertise in continuous offensive security testing, has introduced Cobalt Autonomous Pentest. This innovative service allows for ongoing offensive security evaluations throughout a company's complete application range, providing prompt and practical pentest results within a swift 24-hour timeframe. The integration of artificial intelligence (AI) is revolutionizing the speed of application security processes. With AI-driven development, organizations can now benefit from faster and more efficient security evaluations.

data.title: GTT Recognized with Three 2026 Visionary Spotlight Awards for Demonstrated Channel Excellence
data.description: A prominent networking and security service provider for multinational organizations, GTT Communications Inc. headquartered in Arlington, Virginia, was recently honored with three Visionary Spotlight Awards by ChannelVision Magazine. These accolades include Channel Program of the Year, CSP Network Infrastructure Innovation of the Year, and Most Responsive Supplier Channel Team of the Year. Additionally, GTT received the Channel Partner of the Year Award for the second time in a row, showcasing their commitment to enhancing their channel partner program. This recognition underscores GTT's ongoing efforts to innovate and excel in the industry.

data.title: Tappytoon Ushers in a New Era with “10 Years of Stories” Anniversary Campaign
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, Contents First, the company behind the popular webtoon platform Tappytoon, has kicked off the "10 Years of Stories" campaign to mark a decade of digital storytelling. Tappytoon, launched in 2016, has become a global hub for webtoons and novels, captivating fans worldwide. The milestone campaign, in celebration of Tappytoon’s 10th anniversary, features various fan-focused events and activities both online and offline.

data.title: Ardent Health surpasses 1 million patient encounters supported by ambient AI
data.description: A healthcare organization based in Brentwood, Tennessee, Ardent Health revealed that their physicians and advanced practice providers, affiliated with NYSE-listed ARDT, have successfully completed over 1 million patient encounters with the assistance of Ambience Healthcare's ambient AI platform. This achievement signifies a significant advancement in Ardent Health's objectives to diminish clinician burnout, enhance the provider experience, and fortify patient care. Notably, Ardent-affiliated clinicians utilize Ambience technology in 87% of ambulatory encounters spanning various specialties.

data.title: IONATE and General Motors Collaborate to Modernize U.S. Electrical Infrastructure With Smart Grid Technology
data.description: In London, IONATE revealed a partnership with General Motors to introduce its Hybrid Intelligent Transformer at GM's Romulus factory.

data.title: QuinStreet Sets Date to Announce Fiscal Fourth Quarter and FY2026 Financial Results
data.description: QuinStreet, Inc., a prominent player in performance marketplaces for financial and home services sectors, will disclose its financial outcomes for the fiscal Q4 and full fiscal year ending June 30, 2026 post-market on Thursday, August 6, 2026. The management is scheduled to conduct a conference call and webcast at 2:00 PM PT on the same day to analyze and deliberate on the company's performance. The shares of QuinStreet, Inc. are listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol QNST.

data.title: Installed Building Products to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, Installed Building Products, Inc. (NYSE: IBP) will unveil its Q2 2026 financial results on August 6, 2026. This notable insulation and building products installer plans a webcast and conference call at 10:00 a.m. (ET) on the release day for result discussions. The interested audience can access the conference call on the Company's investor relations webpage.

data.title: Homeowner Satisfaction with Mortgage Servicers Improves as Financial Pressures Mount, JD Power Finds
data.description: In Troy, Michigan, according to JD Power, homeowner satisfaction with mortgage servicers is on the rise despite increasing financial pressures. This improvement comes at a time when many homeowners are facing challenges related to their mortgages. This trend indicates a positive shift in the industry towards better customer service.

data.title: Redfin Reports Pending Home Sales Fall to 3-Month Low
data.description: In Seattle, U.S. pending home sales recently dropped by 1.3% week over week, reaching their lowest point in three months by the end of the four weeks leading up to July 19. This information stems from a fresh report by Redfin, the real estate brokerage fueled by Rocket. This decline in homebuying interest coincides with a surge in weekly average mortgage rates, which have spiked to an 11-month high of 6.55%. Moreover, home prices remain notably high, hovering approximately $900 below their record peak. The volatile U.S. economy, marked by a resurgence in various sectors, has contributed to this fluctuation.

France has withdrawn its embassy staff from Tehran.
- REPORTS

data.title: o9 Solutions Demonstrates Over 10x Faster Optimization for Enterprise Supply Chain Planning with NVIDIA cuOpt
data.description: o9 Solutions, a prominent software company based in Dallas, has unveiled that NVIDIA's cuOpt, an optimization solver accelerated by GPUs, significantly enhances the solve times for extensive supply chain issues. The integration of cuOpt into o9's platform, coupled with NVIDIA Blackwell accelerated computing infrastructure, results in more than a 10x faster solving speed. This development is pivotal as it maintains a solution quality almost on par with prior methods. o9 Solutions operates across 30+ industry sectors with its innovative Digital Brain platform.

data.title: StepStone Group to Announce First Quarter Fiscal 2027 Results on August 6, 2026
data.description: StepStone Group Inc. (Nasdaq: STEP) revealed that on Thursday, August 6, 2026, after the market's closing, the company will unveil its financial results for the quarter that concluded on June 30, 2026, which marks the first quarter of the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2027.
Cass Information Systems announces its Q2 2026 financial results.

Albanian police fired water cannons and tear gas at protesters opposing a coastal tourism project linked to US President Donald Trump’s family. Demonstrators gathered outside parliament in Tirana and demanded Prime Minister Edi Rama’s resignation.

data.title: Ardelyx to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 6, 2026
data.description: A conference call has been set for 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Meadows Surgical Arts Becomes Aesthetic Arts, A Rebrand Rooted in Artistic Vision for Whole-Person Care
data.description: Aesthetic Arts, previously known as Meadows Surgical Arts, has revealed its new name and brand identity in collaboration with Olympus Cosmetic Group after many years. The transformation was spearheaded by Dr. Michael Kluska, a specialist in Plastic & Reconstructive Surgery, Cosmetic Surgery, and General Surgery with triple board certification. Dr. Kluska's patient-centered care approach influenced all elements of the practice's new identity, reflecting a growing demand among patients for personalized care.
